parameters.query:
SELECT draft_id, status, expires_at, approver_discord_id,
       feature_tag, content_type, discord_channel_id, context_json
FROM pipemind.approval_drafts
WHERE discord_message_id = $1
LIMIT 1;

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ content: "\u23f0 This draft has expired. Re-trigger the workflow to create a new one." }) }}

parameters.query:
UPDATE pipemind.approval_drafts
SET status = 'approved', settled_at = now()
WHERE draft_id = $1::uuid AND status = 'pending' AND expires_at > now()
RETURNING draft_id;

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ content: "\u274c Draft rejected. Nothing was sent." }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ content: String('✏️ **Edit mode** — reply to this message with your edited version.\nYour reply replaces the draft. React ✅ on the reply to confirm.\n`Draft ID: ' + $('Lookup Draft').first().json.draft_id + '`').slice(0,2000) }) }}

parameters.query:
UPDATE pipemind.approval_drafts
SET edited_text = $1,
    discord_message_id = $2
WHERE draft_id = $3::uuid;
SELECT discord_id FROM pipemind.roster WHERE discord_id = $1 AND active = TRUE AND role = 'developer' LIMIT 1;

SELECT offer_id, dm_channel_id, feature_area, status
FROM pipemind.unblock_offers
WHERE discord_id = $1
  AND status = 'pending'
  AND offer_date = CURRENT_DATE
ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1

UPDATE pipemind.unblock_offers
SET status = 'accepted', responded_at = now()
WHERE offer_id = $1 AND status = 'pending'

body.content:
[Pipemind] Great — how would you like to proceed?

Reply with one of:
• colleague — loop in a teammate who might be able to help
• meeting — schedule a short focus or pairing session
• just-talk — I will note that you accepted help; no further action needed

parameters.query:
UPDATE pipemind.unblock_offers
SET status = 'help_menu_sent', updated_at = now()
WHERE offer_id = $1 AND status = 'accepted'

SELECT offer_id, dm_channel_id, feature_area, status
FROM pipemind.unblock_offers
WHERE discord_id = $1
  AND status = 'pending'
  AND offer_date = CURRENT_DATE
ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1

UPDATE pipemind.unblock_offers
SET status = 'declined', responded_at = now()
WHERE offer_id = $1 AND status = 'pending'

SELECT offer_id, dm_channel_id, feature_area
FROM pipemind.unblock_offers
WHERE discord_id = $1
  AND status = 'help_menu_sent'
  AND offer_date = CURRENT_DATE
ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1

body.content: [Pipemind] Who would you like to loop in? Reply with their name or describe who is working on the area you need help with. Reply cancel to stop.

parameters.query:
UPDATE pipemind.unblock_offers
SET status = 'colleague_pending', updated_at = now()
WHERE offer_id = $1 AND status = 'help_menu_sent'

SELECT offer_id, dm_channel_id, feature_area
FROM pipemind.unblock_offers
WHERE discord_id = $1
  AND status = 'help_menu_sent'
  AND offer_date = CURRENT_DATE
ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1

body.content: [Pipemind] What time would you like to block? Reply with a time range, e.g. "14:00-15:00 today" or "09:00-09:30 tomorrow". Reply cancel to stop.

parameters.query:
UPDATE pipemind.unblock_offers
SET status = 'meeting_pending', updated_at = now()
WHERE offer_id = $1 AND status = 'help_menu_sent'

SELECT offer_id, dm_channel_id, feature_area
FROM pipemind.unblock_offers
WHERE discord_id = $1
  AND status = 'help_menu_sent'
  AND offer_date = CURRENT_DATE
ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1

UPDATE pipemind.unblock_offers
SET status = 'just_talk', responded_at = now()
WHERE offer_id = $1 AND status = 'help_menu_sent'

body.content: [Pipemind] Noted. Reach out any time if you need anything.

parameters.query:
SELECT uo.offer_id, uo.dm_channel_id, uo.feature_area, uo.status, r.calendar_email AS requester_calendar_email
FROM pipemind.unblock_offers uo
JOIN pipemind.roster r ON r.discord_id = uo.discord_id
WHERE uo.discord_id = $1
  AND uo.status IN ('colleague_pending', 'meeting_pending')
  AND uo.offer_date = CURRENT_DATE
ORDER BY uo.created_at DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT discord_id AS colleague_discord_id, name, calendar_email AS colleague_calendar_email, clockify_user_id AS colleague_clockify_user_id
FROM pipemind.roster
WHERE active = TRUE AND role = 'developer'
  AND LOWER(name) = LOWER($1)
  AND discord_id != $2
LIMIT 1

body.content: [Pipemind] I could not find a teammate by that name. Try again or reply cancel.
[Pipemind] That teammate does not appear to be available today. I cannot reach out to them right now.

parameters.query:
UPDATE pipemind.unblock_offers
SET status = 'colleague_unavailable', updated_at = now()
WHERE offer_id = $1

INSERT INTO pipemind.approval_drafts
  (approver_discord_id, discord_channel_id, feature_tag, content_type, draft_text, context_json, expires_at, boundary_audit_passed)
VALUES
  ($1, $2, 'F-06', 'colleague_dm',
   '[Pipemind] A teammate could use a hand with ' || $3 || '. Are you available to connect with them today?',
   jsonb_build_object('colleague_discord_id', $4, 'feature_area', $3, 'offer_id', $5::text),
   now() + INTERVAL '48 hours',
   TRUE)
RETURNING draft_id;

options.queryReplacement:
={{ [
  $('Classify Event').first().json.discord_id,
  $('Classify Event').first().json.channel_id,
  $('Lookup Offer for Free Text').first().json.feature_area,
  $('Resolve Colleague from Roster').first().json.colleague_discord_id,
  $('Lookup Offer for Free Text').first().json.offer_id
] }}

body.content: ={{ '[Pipemind] Draft: A teammate could use a hand with ' + $('Lookup Offer for Free Text').first().json.feature_area + '. Are you available to connect with them today?\n\nReply ✅ to send, ❌ to cancel.' }}

parameters.query:
UPDATE pipemind.unblock_offers
SET status = 'colleague_draft_pending', draft_id = $1, updated_at = now()
WHERE offer_id = $2

options.queryReplacement: ={{ [ $('Create Colleague Draft').first().json.draft_id, $('Lookup Offer for Free Text').first().json.offer_id ] }}

body.content: [Pipemind] I could not parse that time. Please try again, e.g. "14:00-15:00 today". Reply cancel to stop.

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO pipemind.approval_drafts
  (approver_discord_id, discord_channel_id, feature_tag, content_type, draft_text, context_json, expires_at, boundary_audit_passed)
VALUES
  ($1, $2, 'F-06', 'calendar_event',
   '[Pipemind] Calendar block: Focus session for ' || $3 || ' — ' || $4 || ' to ' || $5 || '.',
   jsonb_build_object('start_iso', $6, 'end_iso', $7, 'feature_area', $3, 'calendar_email', $8, 'offer_id', $9::text),
   now() + INTERVAL '48 hours',
   TRUE)
RETURNING draft_id;

body.content: ={{ '[Pipemind] Calendar block: Focus session for ' + $('Parse Meeting Time').first().json.feature_area + ' — ' + $('Parse Meeting Time').first().json.start_label + ' to ' + $('Parse Meeting Time').first().json.end_label + '.\n\nReply ✅ to create the calendar block, ❌ to cancel.' }}

parameters.query:
UPDATE pipemind.unblock_offers
SET status = 'meeting_draft_pending', draft_id = $1, updated_at = now()
WHERE offer_id = $2

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ timeMin: new Date().toISOString().slice(0, 10) + 'T00:00:00Z', timeMax: new Date().toISOString().slice(0, 10) + 'T23:59:59Z', items: $('Resolve Colleague from Roster').first().json.colleague_calendar_email ? [{ id: $('Resolve Colleague from Roster').first().json.colleague_calendar_email }] : [] }) }}
